item.title: An ‘Originalist’ Court Overturns an Originalist Decision
item.dc:creator: George Thomas

item.title: Ukraine’s Plan to Unnerve Putin
item.description: Recent drone attacks in the Moscow area reveal a multifaceted strategy.
item.dc:creator: Phillips Payson O’Brien

item.title: The Ultimate Triumph of the Unitary Executive
item.description: A half century ago, a new and radical legal theory emerged. Now it is American law.
item.dc:creator: Peter M. Shane

item.title: A False Pretense of Judicial Modesty
item.description: The Supreme Court is remaking the law while claiming to preserve the status quo.
item.dc:creator: Duncan Hosie

item.title: The Man Who Saw AI Coming
item.description: Erik Brynjolfsson wants to talk with you about the future.
item.dc:creator: Annie Lowrey

item.title: The Overlooked Reason Europe Doesn’t Have AC
item.description: Americans and Europeans tend to have very different ideas about physical suffering and sacrifice.
item.dc:creator: Thomas Chatterton Williams

item.title: The Democracies Can Still Triumph
item.description: Liberal societies need to show they can win—without destroying their own values from within.
item.dc:creator: Simon Sebag Montefiore

item.title: Instagram Plus Is a New Low
item.description: Drive yourself crazy for the low price of $3.99 a month!
item.dc:creator: Annie Joy Williams

item.title: The People Who Will Thrive in the AI Age
item.description: What will differentiate people is not how smart they are but their relationship to mental effort.
item.dc:creator: David Brooks

item.title: France Is Too Hot for Shutters and Ceiling Fans
item.description: Millions of people are suffering through the hottest days of their lives with few options.
item.dc:creator: Henry Grabar
